  • Uses of Card.Suit in com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine

    Methods in com.dalegames.highlowjack.engine with parameters of type Card.Suit
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    GameEngine.findHighTrump(List<Trick> tricks, Card.Suit trump)
    Finds the player who was dealt the highest trump card.
    static String
    GameEngine.findJackWinner(List<Trick> tricks, Card.Suit trump)
    Finds the player who captured the Jack of trumps.
    static String
    GameEngine.findLowTrump(List<Trick> tricks, Card.Suit trump)
    Finds the player who was dealt the lowest trump card.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Card.Suit
    Trick.getLeadSuit()
    Returns the lead suit (suit of the first card played).
    Card.Suit
    Card.getSuit()
    Returns the suit of this card.
    Card.Suit
    Game.getTrumpSuit()
    Returns the current trump suit, or null if not yet determined.
    Card.Suit
    Trick.getTrumpSuit()
    Returns the trump suit for this trick.
    static Card.Suit
    Card.Suit.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static Card.Suit[]
    Card.Suit.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    Hand.hasSuit(Card.Suit suit)
    Returns whether this hand contains any cards of the specified suit.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Card(Card.Suit suit, Card.Rank rank)
